title: Playable Fantasy Races
description: A Minecraft mod that adds playable fantasy races into Minecraft!
body:
# Birddie's Fantasy Races 
A mod where you get to play as a dwarf, elf, or halfling in Minecraft!

**Fantasy Races Discord:** https://discord.gg/ZRDv3sUnkX- Join for discussions on the mod, suggestions, or if you find any bugs 

 

## Current traits of each race:

### Dwarf:

1.4m tall

+Increased mining speed

+Night vision underground

+Immune to poison damage

+Extra health

-More starve damage

-Cannot use bone meal

-drowns faster


### Elf:

1.9m tall

+Increased bow damage

+Night vision above ground

+Increased movement speed

-Slower mining underground

-Increased fall damage


### Halfling:

0.9m tall

+Natural Luck

+Dodge chance (40%)

+Immune to wither damage

-Takes increased damage
   
Also has human option for default Minecraft character.      
   
---
     

   
 
   
1.12.2 version requires ArtemisLib: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/artemislib  
   
   
   
If you want to change your race for any reason, use the command /fantasyraces changerace  
   
   
Known compatibility issues:
Any mod that has to do with changes to the player model, including animations, has the possibility to conflict with this mod.

  
Including:
-Ido
